highlights.text: Phi Phi Maya Bay & Krabi 4-Islands speed-craft
Big Buddha, Old Phuket Town & Ao Nang fire show

itinerary.title: Phuket Krabi Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Phuket • Krabi • Phi Phi Islands • Ao Nang Bay
itinerary.overview: Premium Phuket Krabi coastal odyssey — Phi Phi private speedboat, Big Buddha, Old Phuket Town, and Krabi 4-Islands expedition.
itinerary.seo_title: TH-004 | Phuket Krabi Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05N/06D Thailand family package (TH-004): Phi Phi Islands, Big Buddha, Krabi 4-Islands, and Ao Nang fire show.

days.title: Arrival in Phuket & Coastal Welcome
days.description: Traditional Thai greeting at Phuket Airport. Private luxury van to premium beachfront resort. Welcome seaside dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transit, Patong beach orientation
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: Curated Multi-Cuisine Welcome Dinner

days.title: Private Speedboat to Phi Phi Islands
days.description: Private speedboat to Maya Bay, Pileh Lagoon, Bamboo Island, and Viking Cave with island picnic lunch.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private speedboat Phi Phi tour, Maya Bay, Pileh Lagoon, Bamboo Island
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Beachside Island Picnic Lunch

days.title: Phuket Cultural Tour & Departure to Krabi
days.description: Big Buddha, Wat Chalong, Old Phuket Town. Scenic drive to Krabi Ao Nang.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Big Buddha, Wat Chalong, Old Phuket Town, cross-province drive
Overnight Stay: Krabi (Premium Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Thai Fine Dining Lunch

days.title: Krabi 4-Islands Expedition
days.description: Private speed-craft to Tup Island sandbar, Chicken Island snorkeling, Poda Island, and Phra Nang Cave. Ao Nang fire show.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Krabi 4-Islands, Tup sandbar, Chicken Island reef, fire show
Overnight Stay: Krabi (Premium Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Beachside Family Lunch

days.title: Krabi Retreat & Departure
days.description: Final breakfast overlooking the ocean. Private transfer to Krabi International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Boutique souvenir shopping, private airport transfer

hotels.name: Ao Nang Cliff Beach Resort / similar

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked premium family resorts across Phuket and Krabi
Private luxury van and private speedboat to Phi Phi Islands
VIP front-row seats at Ao Nang beach fire show
International airfare and Thailand visa fees
